calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Pos And Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

No appearance by plaintiff and moving party fireside thrift co.
Michael l. jones, defendant in pro per and opposing party, Tel. 650.427.0333, is present in court.

as plaintiff is not present at this hearing, plaintiff is deemed to have stipulated that this motion will be decided by the pro tem judge with the same authority as a superior court judge.

The Court modifies it's ruling: PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.'s claim of exemption is granted in part. Judgment debtor shall have $75 withheld per pay period. order signed in court.

Pro Tem Judge: Arlene Barton, not reported.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-1998 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-02-1998 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-1998 Continued To Sep-23-98 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 212
